clinical_criteria: Measurements from Outpatient visits only (exclude Inpatient and Emergency Department visits)
Exclude measurements within 90 days of any sepsis diagnosis (up to 90 days before or after)
Remove measurements outside +/- 6 SD from overall mean WBC count
algorithm_summary: The WBC phenotype algorithm follows a 7-step process: 1) Extract WBC measurements using SNOMED and LOINC codes, 2) Convert units to 10^9/L, 3) Exclude individuals with specified conditions (blood diseases, cancers, HIV, transplants, etc.), 4) Exclude measurements from inpatients/ED, age <18, within 90 days of sepsis, or with zero values, 5) Remove statistical outliers (>6 SD from mean), 6) Calculate median WBC and median age per individual from remaining measurements, 7) Count flagged individuals. The final output is one median WBC value per eligible individual for analysis.
